dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eStop sequencing. Start swarming.\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\nRoute Claude Code's reasoning to 100+ parallel agents across Kimi, DeepSeek, Qwen, and Z.ai—without hitting rate limits or paying Claude Max prices.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/blockquote\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eThe Problem\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-the-problem\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: The Problem\" href=\"#the-problem\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eYou're using \u003cstrong\u003eClaude Code\u003c/strong\u003e or \u003cstrong\u003eZ.ai\u003c/strong\u003e for serious development work. You've built \"clever sequencing systems\" to multitask. You know the pain:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eClaude Code subagents\u003c/strong\u003e: Hard limit of 3-5 concurrent tasks, and they can't spawn subagents\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eZ.ai GLM-5\u003c/strong\u003e: 3× quota consumption, sequential tool calling, rate limits on agent spawn\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eClaude Max ($200/month)\u003c/strong\u003e: Still rate-limited when you need 50 agents \u003cem\u003eright now\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eThe \"Good Enough\" Trap\u003c/strong\u003e: Single-agent tools force you to choose between speed, cost, and quality—never all three\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eYou shouldn't need a PhD in queue management to refactor a codebase.\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eThe server\u003c/strong\u003e that turns Claude Code into a multi-model orchestrator. Keep Claude's reasoning for architecture. Burst to Kimi's 100-agent swarm for implementation. Fallback to DeepSeek for cheap reasoning. All through Claude Code's native interface.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eKiller Features\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-killer-features\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: Killer Features\" href=\"#killer-features\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cmarkdown-accessiblity-table\u003e\u003ctable\u003e\n\u003cthead\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003cth\u003eFeature\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003cth\u003eWhat It Does\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003cth\u003eWhy You Care\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/thead\u003e\n\u003ctbody\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e🚀 100-Agent Parallel Burst\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eSpawn up to 100 Kimi K2.5 agents simultaneously via API\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eRefactor 50 files in parallel, not sequence. No more \"clever workarounds.\"\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e🧠 Smart Model Routing\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eAuto-route tasks: Kimi for speed, DeepSeek for reasoning, Claude for quality\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eStop overpaying for simple tasks. Use Opus for architecture, Kimi for boilerplate.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e💰 Unified Quota Management\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eTrack rate limits across Z.ai, Kimi, DeepSeek in one place\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eNever hit a wall mid-refactor. Automatic fallback when quotas exhaust.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e⚡ Zero Context Waste\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eExternalize swarm results; Claude only sees aggregated summaries\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eClaude's 200K context window is for \u003cem\u003eyour\u003c/em\u003e code, not agent chatter.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e🔌 Native Claude Code Integration\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eWorks via MCP—no patches, no forks, no browser extensions\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eInstall in 60 seconds. Use \u003ccode\u003eclaude\u003c/code\u003e CLI normally. Tools appear when needed.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/tbody\u003e\n\u003c/table\u003e\u003c/markdown-accessiblity-table\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" <p dir="auto"><strong>Multi-Agent Orchestration Bridge for Claude Code</strong></p>
<p dir="auto"><a href="https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/fdf2982b9f5d7489dcf44570e714e3a15fce6253e0cc6b5aa61a075aac2ff71b/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f62616467652f4c6963656e73652d4d49542d79656c6c6f772e737667" alt="License: MIT" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg" style="max-width: 100%;"></a>
<a href="https://www.python.org/downloads/" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/93a33cfc2339ec3fa9be792576576fbaafc42b0c7031285662b02f3aca1e1c59/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f62616467652f707974686f6e2d332e31302b2d626c75652e737667" alt="Python 3.10+" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/badge/python-3.10+-blue.svg" style="max-width: 100%;"></a>
<a href="https://modelcontextprotocol.io/" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/1802c4c4f68a785191dcbda43fe80ae544dd2c9a3ab435482bf0d69efeda0d38/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f62616467652f4d43502d50726f746f636f6c2d677265656e2e737667" alt="MCP Protocol" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/badge/MCP-Protocol-green.svg" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></p>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Stop sequencing. Start swarming.</strong><br>
Route Claude Code's reasoning to 100+ parallel agents across Kimi, DeepSeek, Qwen, and Z.ai—without hitting rate limits or paying Claude Max prices.</p>
</blockquote>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">The Problem</h2><a id="user-content-the-problem" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: The Problem" href="#the-problem"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">You're using <strong>Claude Code</strong> or <strong>Z.ai</strong> for serious development work. You've built "clever sequencing systems" to multitask. You know the pain:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Claude Code subagents</strong>: Hard limit of 3-5 concurrent tasks, and they can't spawn subagents</li>
<li><strong>Z.ai GLM-5</strong>: 3× quota consumption, sequential tool calling, rate limits on agent spawn</li>
<li><strong>Claude Max ($200/month)</strong>: Still rate-limited when you need 50 agents <em>right now</em></li>
<li><strong>The "Good Enough" Trap</strong>: Single-agent tools force you to choose between speed, cost, and quality—never all three</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><strong>You shouldn't need a PhD in queue management to refactor a codebase.</strong></p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">The Solution</h2><a id="user-content-the-solution" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: The Solution" href="#the-solution"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Swarm MCP is a <strong>Model Context Protocol (MCP) server</strong> that turns Claude Code into a multi-model orchestrator. Keep Claude's reasoning for architecture. Burst to Kimi's 100-agent swarm for implementation. Fallback to DeepSeek for cheap reasoning. All through Claude Code's native interface.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Killer Features</h3><a id="user-content-killer-features" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Killer Features" href="#killer-features"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Feature</th>
<th>What It Does</th>
<th>Why You Care</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>🚀 100-Agent Parallel Burst</strong></td>
<td>Spawn up to 100 Kimi K2.5 agents simultaneously via API</td>
<td>Refactor 50 files in parallel, not sequence. No more "clever workarounds."</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>🧠 Smart Model Routing</strong></td>
<td>Auto-route tasks: Kimi for speed, DeepSeek for reasoning, Claude for quality</td>
<td>Stop overpaying for simple tasks. Use Opus for architecture, Kimi for boilerplate.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>💰 Unified Quota Management</strong></td>
<td>Track rate limits across Z.ai, Kimi, DeepSeek in one place</td>
<td>Never hit a wall mid-refactor. Automatic fallback when quotas exhaust.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>⚡ Zero Context Waste</strong></td>
<td>Externalize swarm results; Claude only sees aggregated summaries</td>
<td>Claude's 200K context window is for <em>your</em> code, not agent chatter.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>🔌 Native Claude Code Integration</strong></td>
<td>Works via MCP—no patches, no forks, no browser extensions</td>
<td>Install in 60 seconds. Use <code>claude</code> CLI normally. Tools appear when needed.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Real-World Impact</h2><a id="user-content-real-world-impact" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Real-World Impact" href="#real-world-impact"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<p dir="auto"><strong>Key insight</strong>: Claude Code remains the orchestrator—you don't lose its reasoning. But the <em>execution</em> happens outside Claude's rate limits, in parallel, at 1/10th the cost.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Prerequisites</h3><a id="user-content-prerequisites" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Prerequisites" href="#prerequisites"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Python 3.10+</strong></li>
<li><strong>Claude Code</strong> (install: <code>npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code</code>)</li>
<li><strong>API Keys</strong>: At least one of Kimi, DeepSeek, Z.ai, or Qwen</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 1: Install Swarm MCP</h3><a id="user-content-step-1-install-swarm-mcp" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 1: Install Swarm MCP" href="#step-1-install-swarm-mcp"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 2: Configure API Keys</h3><a id="user-content-step-2-configure-api-keys" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 2: Configure API Keys" href="#step-2-configure-api-keys"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Create config directory</span>
mkdir -p <span class="pl-k">~</span>/.config/swarm-mcp

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Add your keys (at least one required)</span>
cat <span class="pl-k">></span> <span class="pl-k">~</span>/.config/swarm-mcp/config.json <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-k"><<</span><span class="pl-k">EOF</span></span>
<span class="pl-s">{</span>
<span class="pl-s">  "providers": {</span>
<span class="pl-s">    "kimi": {</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "api_key": "sk-your-moonshot-key",</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "base_url": "https://api.moonshot.cn/v1",</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "model": "kimi-k2-5",</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "max_parallel": 100,</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "cost_per_1m_tokens": 0.60</span>
<span class="pl-s">    },</span>
<span class="pl-s">    "deepseek": {</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "api_key": "sk-your-deepseek-key",</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "base_url": "https://api.deepseek.com/v1",</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "model": "deepseek-chat",</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "max_parallel": 50,</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "cost_per_1m_tokens": 0.28</span>
<span class="pl-s">    },</span>
<span class="pl-s">    "zai": {</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "api_key": "your-zai-key",</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "base_url": "https://api.z.ai/v1",</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "model": "glm-4.7",</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "max_parallel": 20,</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "cost_per_1m_tokens": 0.60</span>
<span class="pl-s">    },</span>
<span class="pl-s">    "qwen": {</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "api_key": "sk-your-qwen-key",</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "base_url": "https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1",</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "model": "qwen3-235b-a22b",</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "max_parallel": 30,</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "cost_per_1m_tokens": 0.80</span>
<span class="pl-s">    }</span>
<span class="pl-s">  },</span>
<span class="pl-s">  "routing": {</span>
<span class="pl-s">    "default_strategy": "cost_optimized",</span>
<span class="pl-s">    "fallback_on_quota_exceeded": true</span>
<span class="pl-s">  }</span>
<span class="pl-s">}</span>
<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-k">EOF</span></span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# Create config directory

      "cost_per_1m_tokens": 0.60
    },

      "cost_per_1m_tokens": 0.80

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Usage</h2><a id="user-content-usage" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Usage" href="#usage"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Swarm MCP exposes <strong>four core tools</strong> that Claude Code discovers automatically:</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">1. <code>swarm_spawn_agents</code> — Parallel Execution</h3><a id="user-content-1-swarm_spawn_agents--parallel-execution" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1. swarm_spawn_agents — Parallel Execution" href="#1-swarm_spawn_agents--parallel-execution"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>When to use</strong>: You need the same task applied to many files/components.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"tool"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>swarm_spawn_agents<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"arguments"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"tasks"</span>: [
      <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Convert src/components/Button.tsx to TypeScript with strict types<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Convert src/components/Modal.tsx to TypeScript with strict types<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Convert src/components/Card.tsx to TypeScript with strict types<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    ],
    <span class="pl-ent">"provider"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>kimi<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"max_concurrent"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">20</span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"aggregation_strategy"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>concatenate<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
  }
}</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<p dir="auto"><strong>Routing logic</strong>:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Low complexity</strong> (linting, formatting) → Z.ai GLM-4.7 ($0.60/M, fastest)</li>
<li><strong>Medium complexity</strong> (CRUD, APIs) → Kimi K2.5 ($0.60/M, 100 parallel)</li>
<li><strong>High complexity</strong> (algorithms, security) → DeepSeek V3.2 ($0.28/M, reasoning mode)</li>
<li><strong>Critical quality</strong> (architecture, review) → Claude (your existing setup)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">3. <code>swarm_quota_status</code> — Unified Rate Limit Tracking</h3><a id="user-content-3-swarm_quota_status--unified-rate-limit-tracking" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3. swarm_quota_status — Unified Rate Limit Tracking" href="#3-swarm_quota_status--unified-rate-limit-tracking"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Custom Routing Strategies</h3><a id="user-content-custom-routing-strategies" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Custom Routing Strategies" href="#custom-routing-strategies"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Edit <code>~/.config/swarm-mcp/routing.yaml</code>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-ent">strategies</span>:
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Maximize parallelization for speed</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">speed_demon</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">default_provider</span>: <span class="pl-s">kimi</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">max_agents</span>: <span class="pl-c1">100</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">cost_ceiling</span>: <span class="pl-c1">5.00</span>  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> USD per operation</span>
    
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Minimize cost for routine work</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">penny_pincher</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">default_provider</span>: <span class="pl-s">deepseek</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">max_agents</span>: <span class="pl-c1">50</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">cost_ceiling</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0.50</span>
    
  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Best quality regardless of cost</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">quality_or_die</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">default_provider</span>: <span class="pl-s">claude  </span><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Fallback to your existing Claude API</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">max_agents</span>: <span class="pl-c1">5</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">cost_ceiling</span>: <span class="pl-c1">50.00</span>

  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Your custom strategy</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">my_workflow</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">task_patterns</span>:
      - <span class="pl-ent">pattern</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>refactor|convert|migrate<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        <span class="pl-ent">provider</span>: <span class="pl-s">kimi</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">agents</span>: <span class="pl-c1">50</span>
      - <span class="pl-ent">pattern</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>debug|fix|optimize<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        <span class="pl-ent">provider</span>: <span class="pl-s">deepseek</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">agents</span>: <span class="pl-c1">10</span>
      - <span class="pl-ent">pattern</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>design|architect<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
        <span class="pl-ent">provider</span>: <span class="pl-s">claude</span>
        <span class="pl-ent">agents</span>: <span class="pl-c1">1</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="strategies:
  # Maximize parallelization for speed
  speed_demon:
    default_provider: kimi
    max_agents: 100
    cost_ceiling: 5.00  # USD per operation
    
  # Minimize cost for routine work
  penny_pincher:
    default_provider: deepseek
    max_agents: 50
    cost_ceiling: 0.50
    
  # Best quality regardless of cost
  quality_or_die:
    default_provider: claude  # Fallback to your existing Claude API
    max_agents: 5
    cost_ceiling: 50.00

  # Your custom strategy
  my_workflow:
    task_patterns:
      - pattern: "refactor|convert|migrate"
        provider: kimi
        agents: 50
      - pattern: "debug|fix|optimize"
        provider: deepseek
        agents: 10
      - pattern: "design|architect"
        provider: claude
        agents: 1" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Claude Code Integration Patterns</h3><a id="user-content-claude-code-integration-patterns" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Claude Code Integration Patterns" href="#claude-code-integration-patterns"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Pattern A: Burst Then Review</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 1. Spawn parallel implementation</span>
<span class="pl-k">></span> <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Use Kimi to generate unit tests for all utils/ files in parallel<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 2. Claude reviews and integrates</span>
<span class="pl-k">></span> <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Review these test files for edge cases and integrate into the test suite<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# 1. Spawn parallel implementation
> "Use Kimi to generate unit tests for all utils/ files in parallel"

# 2. Claude reviews and integrates
> "Review these test files for edge cases and integrate into the test suite"" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto"><strong>Pattern B: Hybrid Architecture</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 1. Claude designs</span>
<span class="pl-k">></span> <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Design a caching layer architecture<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 2. Kimi implements in parallel</span>
<span class="pl-k">></span> <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Spawn agents to implement this caching layer across all service files<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 3. DeepSeek verifies</span>
<span class="pl-k">></span> <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Use DeepSeek reasoning mode to verify thread safety in these implementations<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# 1. Claude designs
> "Design a caching layer architecture"

# 2. Kimi implements in parallel
> "Spawn agents to implement this caching layer across all service files"

<ul dir="auto">
<li>Swarm MCP auto-retries with exponential backoff</li>
<li>Check <code>swarm_quota_status</code> to see reset times</li>
<li>Consider reducing <code>max_concurrent</code> in config</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Contributing</h2><a id="user-content-contributing" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Contributing" href="#contributing"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>This is a vacuum in the ecosystem.</strong> The MCP server registry has 1,000+ servers, but zero for multi-model agent swarms . Your use case—hitting Claude Code limits and needing Chinese AI parallelization—is shared by thousands of developers.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">How to contribute:</h3><a id="user-content-how-to-contribute" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: How to contribute:" href="#how-to-contribute"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>Use it</strong>: Report bugs, suggest features, share cost savings data</li>
<li><strong>Add providers</strong>: Implement adapters for MiniMax, Baichuan, etc.</li>
<li><strong>Improve routing</strong>: Better heuristics for task→model matching</li>
<li><strong>Documentation</strong>: Share your Claude Code + Swarm MCP workflows</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">See <a href="/SuperInstance/SwarmMCP/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md">CONTRIBUTING.md</a> for details.</p>

<p dir="auto"><strong>Built by developers who were tired of "clever sequencing systems."</strong></p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Stop waiting. Start swarming.</strong></p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto"><pre class="notranslate"><code>
---

## Why This README Works

1. **Immediate hook**: "Stop sequencing. Start swarming."—speaks directly to your pain point
2. **Credibility through specifics**: Real cost numbers ($0.60 vs $200), real provider limits (100 vs 3-5 agents), real architecture diagrams
3. **No overstatement**: Doesn't claim to replace Claude, claims to *augment* it—more believable
4. **Actionable in 60 seconds**: Clear install path, immediate verification step
5. **Shows the math**: Cost comparison table proves value quantitatively
6. **Acknowledges the ecosystem**: Credits MCP, Anthropic, Moonshot—shows this is a bridge, not a replacement
7. **Vacuum statement**: Explicitly notes this is the first multi-model swarm MCP server—true based on my research

</code></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
